result.stdout:
-c, --qfDefaultConnection=VALUE
                             Connection string for query generation, overrides
                               config files.
  -m, --makeSelfTest         Make integration test for query. Requires xunit.
                               Overrides config files.
  -g, --generator=VALUE      Generator(s) to use. Will replace generators
                               specified in config files
  -w, --watch                Watch for changes in the file or directory
  -k, --keepOpen             Wait for a keystroke before exiting the console.
  -h, --help                 show this message and exit
  -n, --new=VALUE            create a new QueryFirst query with the specified
                               name.
  -j, --newConfig            create qfconfig.json in the current directory
  -r, --newRuntimeConnection create QfRuntimeConnection.cs in the current
                               directory
